zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Squire於1558年6月3日出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾時，他的父親Reverend William Squire Sr.38歲，母親Alice Skarlett29歲。他和Squire至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他於1612年在英國薩默塞特金維斯頓被列為blacksmith。他去世於1649年12月25日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特金維斯頓享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特金維斯頓邱奇 本 哥吉拉 沙智。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Squire于1558年6月3日出生在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾时，他的父亲Reverend William Squire Sr.38岁，母亲Alice Skarlett29岁。他和Squire至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他于1612年在英国薩默塞特金維斯頓被列为blacksmith。他去世于1649年12月25日在英国英格兰薩默塞特金維斯頓享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特金維斯頓邱奇 本 哥吉拉 沙智。

nameMeanings.name: Squire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name, occupational name, or a nickname from Middle English squyer, squer, skier, sker, northern Middle English swire (Old French escuyer, escuier) ‘shield bearer, esquire, personal attendant to a knight; landowner below the rank of knight; young man of gentle birth; household attendant, retainer, page, messenger’. Many early bearers of this name were of modest means and cannot have been members of the gentry; in such cases the name may have been used hyperbolically for a low-ranking servant or as a nickname. By the 17th century, the term denoted any member of the landed gentry, but this is unlikely to have influenced the development of the surname.

variants.name: Swire
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Squire  , from a northern form of the word.

variants.name: Quire
meanings: Scottish or Irish: shortened form of   McQuire   (see   McGuire  ).

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scuderi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmelo, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Gaetano, Vito, Antonio, Dante, Mario, Rocco, Rosario, Antonino, Biaggio, Eduardo, Ermelinda, Margarita.

Italian (Sicily): status name equivalent to Squire , from scudiero, scutiero, dialect scuteri ‘shieldbearer’ (from medieval Latin scutarius, an agent derivative of scutum ‘shield’). In Byzantium, the Greek word skoutarios denoted a member of the imperial guard.

variants.name: Square
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Squire  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Squire was born on 3 June 1558, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, his father, Reverend William Squire Sr., was 38 and his mother, Alice Skarlett, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Squire. In 1612, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as blacksmith in Kingweston, Somerset, England. He died on 25 December 1649, in Kingweston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Church Of All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Squire. En 1612, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est blacksmith à Kingweston, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1649, à Kingweston, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Church Of All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Squire mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1612, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als blacksmith in Kingweston, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1649 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Kingweston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Church Of All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킨그w스턴 c후르치 프 앨 세인츠
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Squire(이)가 1558년 6월 3일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend William Squire Sr.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Skarlett(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Squire(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1612년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 킨그w스턴에서 blacksmith이었다. 그는 1649년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킨그w스턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킨그w스턴 c후르치 프 앨 세인츠에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Squire nasceu em 3 de junho de 1558, em Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend William Squire Sr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alice Skarlett, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Squire. Em 1612, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como blacksmith em Kingweston, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1649, em Kingweston, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Church Of All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints, Kingweston, Somerset, Englan: чурч оф алл сеинц, кингвестон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Squire родился 3 июня 1558 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Reverend William Squire Sr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Skarlett, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Squire. В 1612 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии blacksmith в местности кингвестон, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 25 декабря 1649 г. в местности кингвестон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности чурч оф алл сеинц, кингвестон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
